Waf build system extensions for compiler integration, build tools, language support, and task management.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initialization file for the `waflib.extras` module in the Pebble firmware SDK.
- **[batched_cc.py](batched_cc.py.md)**: Implements batch compilation for C/C++ files using task management in the Waf build system.
- **[biber.py](biber.py.md)**: Latex processing with "biber" integration and task configuration for various LaTeX compilers.
- **[bjam.py](bjam.py.md)**: Integration of Bjam build tool options and tasks into the Waf build system.
- **[blender.py](blender.py.md)**: Detects Blender version, configures installation paths, and installs Blender extensions using Waf.
- **[boost.py](boost.py.md)**: A Waf tool for integrating Boost libraries into C++ projects, including configuration and build options.
- **[build_file_timestamp.py](build_file_timestamp.py.md)**: Modifies file dependency tracking to include build directory timestamps for partial rebuilds.
- **[build_logs.py](build_logs.py.md)**: Records all outputs to a log file with color replacement and cleanup on exit.
- **[buildcopy.py](buildcopy.py.md)**: Creates a task to copy source files to the build node for constructing a complete Python package.
- **[c_bgxlc.py](c_bgxlc.py.md)**: Configuration script for integrating the IBM XL Compiler for Blue Gene into the Waf build system.
- **[c_dumbpreproc.py](c_dumbpreproc.py.md)**: A C/C++ preprocessor for finding dependencies by analyzing include files after removing comments.
- **[c_emscripten.py](c_emscripten.py.md)**: Integration of Emscripten compiler support into the Waf build system for multiple operating systems.
- **[c_nec.py](c_nec.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the NEC SX Compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[cfg_altoptions.py](cfg_altoptions.py.md)**: Tool to extend `c_config.check_cfg()` by inferring or modifying configuration values via options.
- **[clang_cl.py](clang_cl.py.md)**: Support for using LLVM Clang-CL as a cross-compiler or MSVC replacement in the Waf build system.
- **[clang_compilation_database.py](clang_compilation_database.py.md)**: Generates a JSON compilation database for C and C++ build commands in `compile_commands.json`.
- **[clang_cross.py](clang_cross.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Clang C compiler with support for target and sysroot flags.
- **[clang_cross_common.py](clang_cross_common.py.md)**: Common routines and configuration for cross-compiling with Clang in different environments.
- **[clangxx_cross.py](clangxx_cross.py.md)**: Detects and configures the Clang++ C++ compiler with support for -target and -sysroot flags.
- **[codelite.py](codelite.py.md)**: Generates CodeLite workspace and project files for task generators in a build context.
- **[color_gcc.py](color_gcc.py.md)**: Replaces the default log formatter to colorize GCC output based on message type.
- **[color_msvc.py](color_msvc.py.md)**: Replaces the default formatter to colorize MSVC output based on message type.
- **[color_rvct.py](color_rvct.py.md)**: Replaces the default formatter to interpret and colorize RVCT output in the Pebble firmware build logs.
- **[compat15.py](compat15.py.md)**: Enables compatibility with waf 1.5 by mapping modules and functions to newer versions.
- **[cppcheck.py](cppcheck.py.md)**: A waf wrapper for integrating the C/C++ static analysis tool 'cppcheck' into build systems.
- **[cpplint.py](cpplint.py.md)**: A Waf tool for integrating cpplint into the build process, with options for configuration and output formatting.
- **[cross_gnu.py](cross_gnu.py.md)**: Tool for setting cross-compilation variables using environment variables in build scripts.
- **[cython.py](cython.py.md)**: Integration of Cython into the Waf build system, including task creation and dependency management.
- **[dcc.py](dcc.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for Diab C/C++ compiler tools in the Waf build system.
- **[distnet.py](distnet.py.md)**: Implements a distributed network build system using waf with caching and package management features.
- **[doxygen.py](doxygen.py.md)**: Doxygen integration for the Waf build system, including task definitions and configuration checks.
- **[dpapi.py](dpapi.py.md)**: DPAPI access library for encrypting and decrypting data using Windows API functions.
- **[eclipse.py](eclipse.py.md)**: Generates Eclipse CDT project files for Waf build system integration.
- **[erlang.py](erlang.py.md)**: Erlang build and test support for the Waf build system, including tasks for compiling, testing, and generating documentation.
- **[fast_partial.py](fast_partial.py.md)**: A system for fast partial rebuilds in the Waf build system, optimizing task creation and caching.
- **[fc_bgxlf.py](fc_bgxlf.py.md)**: Configuration for the BGXLF Fortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[fc_cray.py](fc_cray.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the Cray Fortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[fc_flang.py](fc_flang.py.md)**: Detection and configuration of the flang Fortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[fc_fujitsu.py](fc_fujitsu.py.md)**: Detection and configuration of the Fujitsu Fortran compiler for ARM64FX in a Waf build system.
- **[fc_nag.py](fc_nag.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the NAG Fortran Compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[fc_nec.py](fc_nec.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the NEC Fortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[fc_nfort.py](fc_nfort.py.md)**: Detection and configuration of the NEC NFORT Fortran compiler for Aurora Tsubasa in a Waf build system.
- **[fc_open64.py](fc_open64.py.md)**: Integration of the Open64 Fortran Compiler into the Waf build system with configuration and version detection.

- **[fc_solstudio.py](fc_solstudio.py.md)**: Integration of Solaris Studio Fortran compiler support into the Waf build system.
- **[fc_xlf.py](fc_xlf.py.md)**: Configuration and setup for the IBM XL Fortran compiler in the Waf build system.
- **[file_to_object.py](file_to_object.py.md)**: Tool to embed file contents into object files (.o) using assembly or C methods.
- **[fluid.py](fluid.py.md)**: Compiles FLTK fluid files using the 'fluid' and 'cxx' features in a build configuration.
- **[freeimage.py](freeimage.py.md)**: Integration of the FreeImage library into the Waf build system with configuration options.
- **[fsb.py](fsb.py.md)**: Implements a fully sequential build context for the Waf build system.
- **[fsc.py](fsc.py.md)**: Experimental F# build support using the Waf build system, including task and configuration setup.
- **[gccdeps.py](gccdeps.py.md)**: Enhances task execution with GCC dependency tracking and integrates dependency calculation for C/C++ builds.
- **[gdbus.py](gdbus.py.md)**: Compiles dbus files using gdbus-codegen with methods for adding and processing dbus files.
- **[gob2.py](gob2.py.md)**: Defines a build task for converting .gob files to .c files using the gob2 program.
- **[halide.py](halide.py.md)**: Tool for integrating Halide code generation into the Waf build system, with support for environment configuration and task management.
- **[haxe.py](haxe.py.md)**: Haxe build integration for Waf, including compiler checks and task generation for multiple targets.
- **[javatest.py](javatest.py.md)**: Java Unit test support using the `javatest` feature for integration with the waf unit test environment.
- **[kde4.py](kde4.py.md)**: Support for KDE4 libraries and msgfmt, including .po to .mo file transformation and installation.
- **[local_rpath.py](local_rpath.py.md)**: Adds RPATH handling to build tasks for various program and shared library features.
- **[make.py](make.py.md)**: Implements a make-like build execution context that processes tasks based on input/output dependencies.
- **[midl.py](midl.py.md)**: Support for Microsoft Interface Definition Language (MIDL) to generate necessary files from .idl sources.
- **[msvc_pdb.py](msvc_pdb.py.md)**: Adds a unique compile PDB per object for MSVC/Fortran to avoid LNK4099 by updating flags with /Fd.
- **[msvcdeps.py](msvcdeps.py.md)**: A tool for off-loading dependency scanning to the MSVC compiler, optimizing execution time.
- **[msvs.py](msvs.py.md)**: Generates Visual Studio solution and project files for different versions, supporting customization and integration with Waf build system.
- **[netcache_client.py](netcache_client.py.md)**: A client for managing network cache connections and file transfers for build processes.
- **[objcopy.py](objcopy.py.md)**: Support for converting linked targets to ihex, srec, or binary files using objcopy in a build system.
- **[ocaml.py](ocaml.py.md)**: OCaml build support for the Waf build system, including task definitions and environment configurations.
- **[package.py](package.py.md)**: Handles package retrieval, unpacking, and configuration using uselib variables and a Dependencies.txt file.
- **[parallel_debug.py](parallel_debug.py.md)**: Debugging tool for parallel compilation that generates an SVG diagram of the build process.
- **[pch.py](pch.py.md)**: Enables precompiled C++ header support for clang++ and g++ in the Waf build system.
- **[pep8.py](pep8.py.md)**: Integration of the pep8 tool into the waf build system for Python code style checking.
- **[pgicc.py](pgicc.py.md)**: Detects and configures the PGI C compiler for use in the build system.
- **[pgicxx.py](pgicxx.py.md)**: Detects and configures the PGI C++ compiler for the Waf build system.
- **[proc.py](proc.py.md)**: Options and configuration for Oracle ProC integration in the Waf build system.
- **[protoc.py](protoc.py.md)**: Tool for integrating protocol buffers into build systems for C++, Python, and Java using Waf.
- **[pthread.py](pthread.py.md)**: Checks and configures pthread compilation and linking flags for different platforms.
- **[pyqt5.py](pyqt5.py.md)**: Tool for finding Python Qt5/Qt6 tools and libraries, translating QT files to Python, and managing tasks.
- **[pytest.py](pytest.py.md)**: Python unit test support using the `pytest` feature with environment setup for dependencies.
- **[qnxnto.py](qnxnto.py.md)**: QNX Neutrino compatibility functions with a custom Popen class to handle subprocess emulation.
- **[qt4.py](qt4.py.md)**: Tool for integrating Qt4 tools and libraries into a build system, including tasks for processing Qt-specific files.
- **[relocation.py](relocation.py.md)**: Detects and handles project directory relocation in Waf build scripts, updating task signatures as needed.
- **[remote.py](remote.py.md)**: A tool for performing remote builds using rsync and ssh, intended for cross-compilation on specific platforms.
- **[resx.py](resx.py.md)**: Binds .resx files to a resgen task for compiling C# resource files in a build system.
- **[review.py](review.py.md)**: Implements a system for managing and reviewing persistent command-line options in the build process.
- **[rst.py](rst.py.md)**: Experimental reStructuredText support for Waf, including task creation and dependency scanning.
- **[run_do_script.py](run_do_script.py.md)**: Runs Stata do-scripts in a specified directory, using log files for error detection and handling.
- **[run_m_script.py](run_m_script.py.md)**: Runs a Matlab script in batch mode, logs errors, and manages dependencies and log files.
- **[run_py_script.py](run_py_script.py.md)**: Script to run Python scripts with specified version and manage PYTHONPATH in a build environment.
- **[run_r_script.py](run_r_script.py.md)**: Runs R scripts in a specified directory, handling errors and logging output.
- **[sas.py](sas.py.md)**: SAS task integration for the Waf build system, including task creation and dependency management.
- **[satellite_assembly.py](satellite_assembly.py.md)**: Creates satellite assemblies from language-specific resource files using the Waf build system.
- **[scala.py](scala.py.md)**: Scala compilation support for the Waf build system, including task generation and environment configuration.
- **[slow_qt.py](slow_qt.py.md)**: Tool for generating `_moc.cpp` files in the build process, though its use is discouraged for efficiency.
- **[softlink_libs.py](softlink_libs.py.md)**: Implements tasks for finding and installing symbolic links to libraries, excluding specified paths.
- **[sphinx.py](sphinx.py.md)**: Wrapper for the sphinx-build program to manage multiple output formats and installation paths.
- **[stale.py](stale.py.md)**: Adds a pre-build hook to remove build files without corresponding targets in the Waf build system.
- **[stracedeps.py](stracedeps.py.md)**: Executes tasks using strace to obtain dependencies, with limitations on advanced scanners and Windows.
- **[swig.py](swig.py.md)**: Implements dynamic task management for SWIG interface files in the Waf build system.
- **[syms.py](syms.py.md)**: Tool for exporting symbols in shared libraries using regex patterns in Waf build system.
- **[ticgt.py](ticgt.py.md)**: Support for Texas Instruments code generation tools, including compiler environment setup and task management.
- **[unity.py](unity.py.md)**: Enables batch compilation of C/C++ files with configurable batch sizes in the Waf build system.
- **[use_config.py](use_config.py.md)**: A Waf tool for loading configuration parameters from local files or remote URLs to simplify project setup.
- **[valadoc.py](valadoc.py.md)**: Task and feature for generating API documentation from Vala source code using valadoc in the Waf build system.
- **[waf_xattr.py](waf_xattr.py.md)**: Enables use of extended filesystem attributes for task signature management in Python3/Linux systems.
- **[why.py](why.py.md)**: Modifies the task signature scheme in Waf to track task execution reasons and dependencies.
- **[win32_opts.py](win32_opts.py.md)**: Windows-specific file listing optimizations for the Waf build system to reduce overhead.
- **[wix.py](wix.py.md)**: Tools for building Windows Installer packages using WiX with tasks for 'candle' and 'light' processes.
- **[xcode6.py](xcode6.py.md)**: XCode project generator for Waf, supporting multiple XCode versions and project configurations.
